title: alisma minus
intro: Alisma minus, also known as water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma minus include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, edema, and hypertension, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Alisma minus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, teas, capsules, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation and individual tolerance.
